reasoning_content:
The user wants the layout of the provided document extracted into a JSON object with bounding boxes.

1.  **Identify the main sections:**
    *   Title: "MMBT3904L, SMMBT3904L"
    *   Subtitle: "ELECTRICAL CHARACTERISTICS..."
    *   Table: "ELECTRICAL CHARACTERISTICS" table.
    *   Footer text: "Product parametric performance..." and "4. Pulse Test..."
    *   Figure 1: "Delay and Rise Time Equivalent Test Circuit"
    *   Figure 2: "Storage and Fall Time Equivalent Test Circuit"
    *   Bottom footer: "www.onsemi.com", page number, "Share Feedback".

2.  **Break down the table:**
    *   Header row: Characteristic, Symbol, Min, Max, Unit.
    *   Section headers: OFF CHARACTERISTICS, ON CHARACTERISTICS, SMALL-SIGNAL CHARACTERISTICS, SWITCHING CHARACTERISTICS.
    *   Data rows: Each row contains the description, symbol, min, max, unit. Some rows span multiple lines or have nested conditions.

3.  **Break down the figures:**
    *   Figure 1 includes a circuit diagram and a waveform diagram.
    *   Figure 2 includes a circuit diagram and a waveform diagram.
    *   Captions below the figures.

4.  **Extract coordinates (approximate based on visual inspection):**
    *   Title: Top center.
    *   Table: Spans most of the page width.
    *   Figures: Bottom half, side-by-side.
    *   Footer: Bottom center.

5.  **Construct JSON:** Iterate through each element, defining its type (text, table, figure) and bounding box.

    *   *Self-Correction during extraction:* The table is complex. I need to be careful with rows that have multiple conditions (like DC Current Gain). I will group the text logically. The "Characteristic" column often has multiple lines. I should capture the full text for that cell.

    *   *Refining Bboxes:*
        *   Title: [35, 48, 57, 555]
        *   Subtitle: [67, 100, 80, 550]
        *   Table Header: [83, 100, 103, 900]
        *   OFF CHARACTERISTICS: [106, 100, 116, 280]
        *   ... (Proceed row by row)
        *   Figure 1: [700, 100, 850, 450] (approximate area for the diagram)
        *   Figure 2: [700, 550, 850, 900] (approximate area)
        *   Captions: [860, 150, 880, 350] and [860, 600, 880, 850]

    *   *Detailed Table Extraction:*
        *   Row 1: Collector-Emitter Breakdown Voltage... | V(BR)CEO | 40 | - | Vdc
        *   Row 2: Collector-Base Breakdown Voltage... | V(BR)CBO | 60 | - | Vdc
        *   ...
        *   ON CHARACTERISTICS (Note 4)
        *   DC Current Gain (multiple sub-rows)
        *   ...

    *   *Figures:* The request asks for layout. I will group the figure components (diagram + caption) or list them separately if they are distinct visual blocks. The prompt asks for "layout with bboxes", implying a structured representation. I will list the main text blocks and the table structure.

    *   *Final Polish:* Ensure all text is transcribed accurately. Check units and symbols.

    *   *JSON Structure:*
        ```json
        [
          {"bbox_2d": [y1, x1, y2, x2], "text_content": "..."},
          ...
        ]
        ```
